title: Solana Agent Transaction Validator
description: Before an agent signs any Solana transaction, call three GoldRush endpoints in parallel: (1) recipient wallet summary — is this a fresh wallet or known flagged address? (2) token risk score — does the token have active mint/freeze authority? (3) agent wallet balance — is there enough SOL for rent + fees? Combine results into a structured go/no-go payload the agent parses before submitting any instruction to the network.
